evals.expected_output: Reads the PRD, extracts all 7 completed phases, updates vault CLAUDE.md with an 'Obsidian Features' section documenting dashboards/MOCs/canvases/templates/graph/bookmarks, updates MEMORY.md Implementation Status with completion line, runs vault validation (44/44 clean), checks MEMORY.md line count (<200)

assertions.text: Reads PRD-obsidian-vault-wow.md before making edits
Reads vault CLAUDE.md before editing
Reads MEMORY.md before editing
Adds Obsidian Features section to vault CLAUDE.md
Documents dashboards, MOCs, canvases, templates in CLAUDE.md
Adds 'Obsidian Vault Wow: COMPLETE' to MEMORY.md Implementation Status
Runs vault.py validate after edits
Checks MEMORY.md line count is under 200
Uses Edit tool, not Write, for modifications
Does not duplicate existing entries

evals.prompt: /vault-sync "Completed ISR build hardening — revalidation API, cache-warm GH Action, env ISR count, removed optimizeCss. Commit b21a37e."
evals.expected_output: Takes the description string (no PRD file), adds 'ISR Build Hardening: COMPLETE (b21a37e)' to MEMORY.md Implementation Status, adds relevant build gotchas (optimizeCss removed, ISR env var, revalidation endpoint), runs validation

assertions.text: Does not try to read a file from the description string
Reads MEMORY.md before editing
Adds ISR Build Hardening status to Implementation Status section
Includes commit hash b21a37e in status line
Adds relevant build gotchas (optimizeCss, ISR count, revalidation)
Runs vault.py validate after edits
Checks MEMORY.md line count

evals.expected_output: Reads the PRD, determines it has planned/in-progress phases, presents the update plan to the user WITHOUT making any edits — shows what would be added to vault CLAUDE.md (PRD table status update) and MEMORY.md (GEO Storm status), does NOT call Edit tool

assertions.text: Reads PRD-geo-storm-v3.md
Reads vault CLAUDE.md to understand current state
Reads MEMORY.md to understand current state
Presents planned changes to user
Does NOT use Edit tool (dry-run mode)
Does NOT use Write tool (dry-run mode)
Shows what would change in vault CLAUDE.md
Shows what would change in MEMORY.md
